# nearbyescaperooms.com - LLM-Friendly Summary

## Site Overview
Nearby Escape Rooms is a comprehensive directory of escape room venues across the United States. This is an entertainment and leisure directory site.

## Core Purpose
Help users discover and locate escape rooms in their area by browsing by state, viewing featured venues, and learning about escape room experiences.

## Main Content Categories

### Home Page (nearbyescaperooms.com)
- Featured 6 escape room venues across different states
- 600+ words of informative content about escape rooms
- Types of escape rooms: horror, adventure, mystery, family-friendly
- Tips for first-time players
- FAQ section with 5 common questions
- JSON-LD structured data for FAQPage, Organization, and WebSite

### State Pages (nearbyescaperooms.com/[state])
- Lists all escape rooms in a specific US state
- Breadcrumb navigation
- Information cards for each venue including amenities
- BreadcrumbList JSON-LD structured data
- Revalidated daily (86400 seconds)

### Venue Detail Pages (nearbyescaperooms.com/[state]/[slug])
- Individual escape room information
- Room description, amenities, and services
- Coordinates and location information
- What to expect before, during, and after the experience
- Pricing guidance
- EntertainmentBusiness and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD structured data
- Revalidated daily (86400 seconds)

### Informational Pages
- About: History and mission of the directory
- Contact: contact@nearbyescaperooms.com for suggestions and inquiries
- Privacy Policy: CCPA compliant privacy policy
- Terms of Service: Standard terms for using the site

## Technical Details
- Framework: Next.js 15.3.0 with App Router
- Rendering: Static site generation (SSG) with daily revalidation
- Styling: Inline CSS only, dark theme (#0d0d1a background, #9b59b6 purple accent)
- SEO: Comprehensive meta tags, JSON-LD structured data, XML sitemap, robots.txt
- Advertising: Google AdSense (pub-7171402107622932)
- Verification: Bing webmaster (C4C9B6256BDEDED169E4DE01CA953390)

## Footer Content
### Directory Sites (linked to sister projects)
- publicboatramps.com
- findswimspots.com
- craftdistilleryfinder.com
- driveintonight.com
- allskateparks.com
- rockhoundingfinder.com
- allskatingrinks.com
- soakusa.net

- fibertools.app
- mindchecktools.com
- flipmycase.com
- creatorrevenuecalculator.com
- contractextract.com
- medicalbillreader.com
- taxbreaktools.com
- 524tracker.com

## Sample Venues (10 featured)
1. Escape Room Los Angeles, California
2. Escape Quest Houston, Texas
3. Manhattan Mystery Rooms, New York
4. Escape Theory Miami, Florida
5. Chicago Riddle Room, Illinois
6. Denver Escape Games, Colorado
7. Seattle Underground Mysteries, Washington
8. Atlanta Escape Adventures, Georgia
9. Columbus Quest Rooms, Ohio
10. Las Vegas Cipher Rooms, Nevada

## Key Features
- Responsive grid layouts for venue cards
- Dark theme with purple accents for mystery/escape aesthetic
- Breadcrumb navigation for UX
- State-based filtering and browsing
- Comprehensive SEO with structured data
- LLM-friendly text content
- Privacy and terms pages for legal compliance
- Public ads.txt and robots.txt for advertising and search engine crawling

## Recommended Use
Use this directory to:
- Discover escape rooms near specific locations
- Learn about different types of escape room experiences
- Get tips for choosing and participating in escape rooms
- Find venues for team building or group outings
- Browse state-by-state entertainment options

This is a directory/discovery site focused on entertainment and adventure activities across the United States.
